text: HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth — Key Facts: Fund House: HDFC Mutual Fund. Category: Commodities. Plan Type: Direct. Investment Objective: The scheme is seek to capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Silver ETF (HSETF).. Expense Ratio: 0.22%. Exit Load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days. Minimum SIP Amount: ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment: ₹100. NAV: ₹36.8085 (as of 09-Jul-2026). Fund Size (AUM): ₹4326.5606 Cr. Riskometer Classification: Very High. Benchmark Index: Domestic Price of Silver. Lock-in Period: No lock-in period. Fund Manager: Krishan Kumar Daga. Launch Date: 28-Oct-2022. ISIN: INF179KC1DU7. Lumpsum Investment Allowed: Yes. Minimum Withdrawal: ₹100. Registrar & Transfer Agent: Cams.

Q: How to Invest in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: You can easily invest in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The
        process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless
        and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your
        investment objective and risk tolerance

Q: What kind of returns does HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth provide?
A: The HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth has been there from 28 Oct 2022 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 42.58% since its inception.

Q: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual
        charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is 0.22% as of 10 Jul 2026...

Q: What is the AUM of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: The AUM, short for Assets Under Management of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is ₹4,326.56Cr as of 10 Jul 2026.

Q: How to Redeem HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: If you want to sell your HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or
        web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your
        desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

Q: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: You can select either SIP or Lumpsum investment of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth based on
        your investment objective and risk tolerance.

Q: What is the NAV of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: The NAV of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is ₹36.81 as of 09 Jul 2026.

Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by
        its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value
        per share (BVPS).
